name: INTEL CORP
summary: Intel Corporation is a semiconductor company that designs and manufactures processors, chipsets, and related technologies. The company develops products including CPUs, GPUs, FPGAs, and networking solutions for data centers, personal computers, and embedded applications. Intel also operates a foundry services business. Its CEO is Lip-Bu Tan and its principal financial officer is David Zinsner.
